variants.title: Donaldson H001189 Pre-Cleaner Body Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson H001189 Pre-Cleaner Body Assembly is designed to provide reliable performance in pre-cleaner body assembly applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Pre-Cleaner Body Assembly, Outer Diameter: 406.0 mm, Length: 468.0 mm
